# BR Lawn Care — Full Business Profile

> Locally owned, fully insured lawn and landscape company serving Eastern North Carolina. Phone: 252.503.0984. Free estimates within 24 hours. Lawn care starts at $55.

## Business Overview

BR Lawn Care is a locally owned and operated lawn and landscape company headquartered in Eastern North Carolina. The business handles residential and commercial accounts with a small, experienced crew focused on clean work, straight pricing, and fast turnaround.

The business was built around a simple principle: show up, work hard, and leave the property better than we found it. No runaround, no hidden fees, no pushy upsells — just an honest quote and reliable service.

## Services in Detail

### Lawn Care — Starting at $55

Regular and one-time lawn maintenance, including:
- Mowing (all standard grass types common to Eastern NC)
- Edging (along sidewalks, driveways, flower beds, and fences)
- String trimming (around trees, obstacles, and fence lines)
- Blow-off and cleanup (driveways, walkways, patios)
- Seasonal cleanup (leaf removal in fall, storm debris as needed)

Schedule options: one-time, weekly, bi-weekly. Pricing depends on lot size, terrain, and frequency — a free estimate takes about 60 seconds to request.

### Tree and Stump Removal

Full tree work, including:
- Tree takedowns of all sizes
- Trimming and pruning
- Stump grinding (below grade)
- Complete cleanup and haul-off (we never leave a yard full of wood)
- Storm damage response

Safety is non-negotiable. Every tree job is fully insured and handled with proper equipment. For large takedowns near structures, on-site assessment and written scope are standard.

### Landscape Installs

Full landscape buildouts and refreshes:
- Sod installation (new lawns, replacement patches, regrading)
- Mulch installation (beds, around trees, playground areas)
- Rock and gravel (decorative beds, drainage solutions)
- Plantings (shrubs, small trees, annuals, perennials)
- Full front- or backyard makeovers

Whether it's a single bed refresh or a brand-new front yard, installs are built to last — proper prep, quality materials, and cleanup included.

### Land Clearing

For overgrown lots, vacant land, and neglected properties:
- Brush and underbrush removal
- Downed tree and limb removal
- Debris hauling and disposal
- Site prep for builds, fences, and new installs
- Residential and commercial parcels

### Pressure Washing

Exterior surfaces restored and refreshed:
- Driveways and concrete aprons
- House siding (vinyl, fiber cement, brick)
- Decks and patios
- Walkways and stairs
- Fences

### Property Management

Ongoing maintenance for property owners, rental portfolios, HOAs, and commercial lots:
- Consistent mowing and upkeep schedules
- Seasonal cleanups
- On-call for storm damage and extras
- One point of contact, one monthly invoice
- Certificate of insurance available for managers and HOAs

## Service Area

BR Lawn Care operates across Eastern North Carolina and surrounding counties. If you're unsure whether your property falls inside the service area, call 252.503.0984 and ask directly.

## Pricing Philosophy

- Lawn care starts at $55 for standard residential properties.
- Tree, landscape, and clearing work is quoted per job after a free estimate.
- Every estimate is free, includes a complete breakdown, and has no hidden line items.
- Invoices are simple. Commercial and recurring accounts are billed monthly.

## How to Get an Estimate

The fastest path is the free estimate form at https://brlawncare.com/contact.html — it takes about 60 seconds. Attach or mention a few property photos, rough size, and the services you think you need (or just "not sure, you tell me").

Estimates are returned within 24 hours, usually same-day. For urgent jobs, call 252.503.0984 directly.

## Insurance and Credentials

BR Lawn Care is fully insured for both residential and commercial operations. A certificate of insurance is available on request for HOAs, property managers, and commercial clients.

## Business Hours

Monday through Saturday, 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM local time. Closed Sundays.

## Contact

- **Phone:** 252.503.0984
- **Estimate Form:** https://brlawncare.com/contact.html
- **Website:** https://brlawncare.com
- **Region:** Eastern North Carolina
- **Hours:** Mon – Sat, 7am – 7pm

## Why People Book BR Lawn Care

1. **Fully insured** — certificate available on request
2. **Free estimates** — 24-hour reply, no pressure
3. **Same-week scheduling** — most standard jobs start within the week
4. **Honest pricing** — no hidden fees, no upsell pressure
5. **One crew, one invoice** — residential, commercial, and recurring accounts all handled by the same team
6. **Locally owned** — built and run in Eastern North Carolina
